---

Great salespeople want to be number one in their industry, not number one in their company. Look, they know this number one status will result in more sales. Number one is not about an ego for these people. Maybe, maybe partly, maybe it's partly ego, but they know if I can tell my customers I am the freaking God of this industry. If I can tell my customers I am the man, the man, I am it. I am number one. They know that that is a leverage for more sales, bigger margins, and a perception, a perception that you just can't replace. Look, number one is number one. Number one is the only position that you want to be in. Look, let's face it. If you're not first, you know it. If you're not first, like my book says, if you're not first, second, third, fourth, fifth, or sixth, it's just last. Be first. Be great. It means more sales. It's not just about ego.
